Package net.pl3x.guithium.api.gui.element

Class Gradient

java.lang.Object
net.pl3x.guithium.api.key.Keyed
net.pl3x.guithium.api.gui.element.AbstractElement<Rect<Gradient>>
net.pl3x.guithium.api.gui.element.Rect<Gradient>
net.pl3x.guithium.api.gui.element.Gradient
All Implemented Interfaces:
Element, JsonSerializable
public class Gradient extends Rect<Gradient>
Represents a gradient filled rectangle element.

    • getColors

      public int[] getColors()
      Get the colors for all four corners.

      Array index starts at top left and iterates counterclockwise.

      Returns:
      Array of colors of all four corners
